title: rubus goniophylloides
intro: Rubus goniophylloides, also known as the Himalayan raspberry or Himalayan raspberry bush, is a species of flowering plant in the rose family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Rubus goniophylloides include its potential to lower blood pressure, improve digestion, and reduce the risk of certain diseases due to its rich content of vitamins, minerals, and antioxidants. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are commonly consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
